subject: FW: Jeffrey Epstein
body:
From: Lawrence Krauss [mailto:krauss@case.edu] 
Sent: Thursday, June 19, 2008 8:04 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Cc: Lawrence Krauss
Subject: Re: Jeffrey Epstein

 

Hi Lesley:  Can you give Jeffrey this message?:

 

I have just returned from Arizona...  Symposium is growing.. there will
be 2 nobel panels...   I have drafted Origins Proposal for Arizona.. it
has not been vetted yet, but could send..    Would like to talk to you
sometime.

 

Lawrence

 

 

Lawrence M. Krauss

Ambrose Swasey Prof. of Physics and Astronomy

Director, Center for Education and Research in Cosmology and
Astrophysics

Dept of Physics, CWRU

10900 Euclid Ave, Cleveland OH 44106-7079

krauss@case.edu   216 368 4070

 





 

On May 30, 2008, at 8:58 AM, Lesley Groff wrote:





Hello Lawrence!  Jeffrey knows you will be in the city tomorrow and
would like to know if you had time tomorrow to visit with him??!!  He
suggested possibly breakfast tomorrow (Sat. May 31)

 

Let me know if breakfast (or something else) may be possible.

 

Thanks, Lesley

 

Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
body_html:
From: Lawrence Krauss [mailto:krauss@case.edu]
Sent: Thursday, June 19, 2008 8:04 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Cc: Lawrence Krauss
Subject: Re: Jeffrey Epstein

 

Hi Lesley:  Can you give Jeffrey this message?:

 

I have just returned from Arizona...  Symposium is growing.. there will be 2 nobel panels...   I have drafted Origins Proposal for Arizona.. it has not been vetted yet, but could send..    Would like to talk to you sometime.

 

Lawrence

 

 

Lawrence M. Krauss

Ambrose Swasey Prof. of Physics and Astronomy

Director, Center for Education and Research in Cosmology and Astrophysics

Dept of Physics, CWRU

10900 Euclid Ave, Cleveland OH 44106-7079

krauss@case.edu   216 368 4070

 



 

On May 30, 2008, at 8:58 AM, Lesley Groff wrote:



Hello Lawrence!  Jeffrey knows you will be in the city tomorrow and would like to know if you had time tomorrow to visit with him??!!  He suggested possibly breakfast tomorrow (Sat. May 31)

 

Let me know if breakfast (or something else) may be possible.

 

Thanks, Lesley

 

Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein

subject: FW: Jeffrey Epstein
body:
From: Karla Taylor [mailto:taylor@brockman.com] 
Sent: Thursday, May 29, 2008 12:32 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Re: Jeffrey Epstein

 

Dear Lesley,

 

Here is what John would send out, and below is the list of people he
would invite.

 

Please let me know if there are any changes, and I will proceed.

 

Best wishes,

Karla

 

 

 

Dear xxx,

 

Jeffrey Epstein asked me to invite you to a lunch he is organizing for
some of the scientists and luminaries at the World Science Festival:

 

Host:   Jeffrey Epstein

Date:   Friday, May 30th

Time:   12:30 pm

Place:   9 East 71st Street, between Madison and Fifth Ave.

 

Unfortunately, I am in California at the WSJ All Things Digital
conference; I am sorry to miss the lunch.  Please rsvp to my assistant,
Karla Taylor (taylor@brockman.com; 212-935-8900 x19).  

 

Best regards,

JB

 

====

 

Alan Alda

Stephon Alexander

Paula S. Apsell

Paul Bloom

Max Brockman

Patricia Churchland

Francis Collins

Paul Davies

Tracy Day

Daniel Dennett

David Eagleman

Peter Galison

Brian Greene

Marc Hauser

Walter Isaacson

Michio Kaku

Lawrence Krauss

Robert Krulwich

Ray Kurzweil

Richard Leakey

Leon Lederman

Janna Levin

Vilayanur Ramachandran

Paul Steinhardt

Leonard Susskind

Carl Zimmer

 

	From: John Brockman [mailto:brockman@edge.org] 
	Sent: Thursday, May 29, 2008 11:21 AM
	To: Lesley Groff
	Subject: Re: Jeffrey Epstein

	 

	Carlsbad, CA

	 

	See what I can do. I can write to the people there and have them
cc you, but in middle of conference in CA.

	 

	Best,

	JB

	 

	On May 29, 2008, at 6:37 AM, Lesley Groff wrote:

	
	
	
	

	Good Morning John!  Jeffrey is wondering if, with all the
scientists in town for the World Science Festival, you might want to
organize a lunch a Jeffrey's house tomorrow (with interesting
scientists!)

	 

	Let me know what you think!

	 

	Thanks, Lesley

	 

	~~
	John Brockman

	917-744-8920 mobile

	 

	May 26-29 San Diego
	May 29-June 1 Los Angeles
	June 2 New York

	 

	President, Edge Foundation, Inc.
	5 East 59th Street, New York, NY 10022
	
	tel: 212.935.8900 x11
	brockman@edge.org
	~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
	EDGE Newsbytes:
	http://www.edge.org/newsbytes.html
	~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

	 

 

~~

Karla Taylor

Brockman, Inc.
5 East 59th Street
New York, NY 10022
taylor@brockman.com

tel: 212.935.8900 x19
fax: 212.935.5535
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

http://www.edge.org

body:
From: egneurocog@aol.com [mailto:egneurocog@aol.com] 
Sent: Friday, May 09, 2008 4:11 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Re: Jeffrey Epstein

 

Hi Lesley,

As you may know, Jeffrey and I have continued our discussions about
launching a brain modeling project. I would like to introduce to Jeffrey
Prof. Larry Abbott, Director of the Theoretical Neurobiology Program at
Columbia University and the author of the authoritative text on
computational neuroscience. Please let me know if we can set up a
meeting at Jeffrey's convenience.

Best wishes,

EG

Elkhonon Goldberg, Ph.D., ABPP

Clinical Professor of Neurology
New York University School of Medicine

Diplomate
American Board of Professional Psychology
in Clinical Neuropsychology

315 West 57th Street
Suite 401
New York, NY 10019
USA

fax +1 212 246 8916
egneurocog@aol.com
elkhonon.goldberg@med.nyu.edu
www.elkhonongoldberg.com <http://www.elkhonongoldberg.com>

subject: FW: Jeffrey Epstein
body:
From: Marvin Minsky [mailto:minsky@media.mit.edu] 
Sent: Tuesday, October 23, 2007 8:53 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Re: Jeffrey Epstein

 

Dear Leslie,

 

We are planning to have a conference about 

   (tentative title)  "5-year Plan for a Smart  Machine to do
Commonsense Thinking." 

 

It looks like good dates would be the weekends of November 17-18 or
24-25.  

Are those dates possible for JE?  (A single day might be enough for
Jeffrey.)

If not, what would be better dates for him?  

 

(Early December would also be OK, except that Hal Abelson will be away.)


 

I'll send a list of participants as soon as we agree on them.  We'll
only invite people who might 

actually work on the project.  I hope Danny Hillis will be one.  Also,
Mike Dubno could be a valuable participant.) 

 

-- marvin
body_html:
From: Marvin Minsky [mailto:minsky@media.mit.edu]
Sent: Tuesday, October 23, 2007 8:53 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Re: Jeffrey Epstein

 

Dear Leslie,

 

We are planning to have a conference about 

   (tentative title)  “5-year Plan for a Smart  Machine to do Commonsense Thinking.”

 

It looks like good dates would be the weekends of November 17-18 or 24-25.  

Are those dates possible for JE?  (A single day might be enough for Jeffrey.)

If not, what would be better dates for him?  

 

(Early December would also be OK, except that Hal Abelson will be away.) 

 

I'll send a list of participants as soon as we agree on them.  We'll only invite people who might 

actually work on the project.  I hope Danny Hillis will be one.  Also, Mike Dubno could be a valuable participant.) 

 

-- marvin
